fulltext: FSM_Sensor shall always satisfy (senstate = sen_fault_state & (!request | !limits)) => SENSTATE = sen_transition_state
FSM_Sensor shall always  satisfy (senstate = sen_nominal_state & !request) => SENSTATE = sen_transition_state
FSM_Sensor shall  always  satisfy (senstate = sen_fault_state & !request & !limits) => SENSTATE = sen_transition_state
FSM_Sensor shall always satisfy (senstate = sen_nominal_state & limits) => SENSTATE = sen_fault_state
FSM_Sensor shall always satisfy (senstate = sen_transition_state & request & activeMode) => SENSTATE = sen_nominal_state
FSM_Sensor shall always satisfy (senstate = sen_nominal_state & !request & !limits) => SENSTATE = sen_transition_state
